summary: Verified both bug fixes: 1) POD photos now save to Web project's wwwroot/pod folder and are accessible via HTTP, 2) Route optimization no longer returns 'Optimization Failed' - gracefully falls back to local optimization when Circuit API fails. Fixed missing 3-photo POD URL fields in /api/orders/{id} endpoint.

minor.issue: Was missing photoHomeUrl, photoAddressUrl, photoPackageUrl fields in Select projection - FIXED

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed /api/orders/{id} to include all 3 POD photo URL fields (photoHomeUrl, photoAddressUrl, photoPackageUrl)
DriverPortalController.SavePhotoAsync correctly saves to Web project's wwwroot/pod folder
RoutesController.OptimizeRoute correctly falls back to local optimization when Circuit API fails
seed_data_creation: Order RX-BKN00002 has 3-photo POD format with all photos stored in Web wwwroot/pod
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both major bugs fixed and verified: 1) POD photos save to Web wwwroot/pod and are HTTP accessible, 2) Route optimization falls back to local when Circuit API returns invalid key error. All features working correctly.

evidence: SavePhotoAsync method in DriverPortalController saves to Path.Combine(_env.ContentRootPath, '..', 'RxExpresss.Web', 'wwwroot', 'pod')
Files exist in /app/rxexpresss-solution/RxExpresss.Web/wwwroot/pod/
10 POD files verified in directory (home, addr, pkg, signature files)
curl -s https://pod-upload-staging.preview.emergentagent.com/pod/home_RX-BKN00002_20260319175005.jpg returns HTTP 200
All 3 photo types (home, addr, pkg) return HTTP 200
Signature files return HTTP 200
Content-Type headers correctly set for image/jpeg and image/png
POST /api/routes/{id}/optimize returns {message: 'Route optimized successfully', status: 'optimized'}
Response shows circuitConfigured: true, usedCircuit: false
Backend logs confirm: 'Circuit plan creation failed for gig, using local optimization'
No 'Optimization Failed' error message in response
When Circuit API returns 'Invalid API key' error, fallback is triggered
Backend logs: 'Using local optimization for gig (Circuit: Circuit integration unavailable)'
OptimizationStatus correctly set to 'optimized'
Gig cards on Routes page show 'Optimized' badge
Order Details modal shows 'Proof of Delivery (3 Photos)' section
Three photos displayed: '1. Home', '2. Address', '3. Package'
Photos render correctly from Web wwwroot/pod folder
Signature image also displays correctly
Screenshot captured showing all 3 POD photos for RX-BKN00002
/api/orders/{id} now returns photoHomeUrl, photoAddressUrl, photoPackageUrl fields
/api/admin/orders includes all POD URL fields in list response
Fields correctly show null for legacy single-photo orders and URLs for 3-photo orders

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/orders/{id} - PASS (fixed to include 3 POD URLs)
GET /pod/* (static files) - PASS (HTTP 200 for all POD photos)
ui_flows_tested: Order detail modal with POD photos (3-photo format)
Route optimization button and success toast
rca_of_the_issue: Two bugs fixed: 1) POD SavePhotoAsync was correctly updated to save to Web wwwroot/pod instead of API wwwroot - verified working. 2) Route optimization was failing because Circuit API key is invalid - fix added graceful fallback to local optimization in RoutesController.OptimizeRoute method - verified working. Minor fix: /api/orders/{id} endpoint was missing 3 POD URL fields in Select projection.
